decision.rationale: The bounded result identified a credible DEEP refactor target, but this STANDARD slice did not implement or prove an Engine change.
decision.stay_experimental_reason: No Engine code change, executed proof, or Directive-owned implementation artifact was materialized in this STANDARD slice.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the typed stage-chaining pattern remains valuable as Engine orchestration structure even without a reusable runtime surface
